data.title: Columbia Sportswear begins hunting for a new chief digital officer
data.description: As chief digital information officer, Skip Potter was earning total annual compensation of $1.881 million, including a base salary of $680,000

data.title: Fossil website to integrate Amazon's Buy with Prime options
data.description: Buy with Prime's fulfillment options will arrive on the Fossil website in February. The announcement means that Fossil's Prime-eligible watches, handbags and jewelry will display Prime options at checkout for customers, who can then verify their Prime membership before selecting payment options.

data.title: VTEX North America EVP Dani Jurado on 2025 B2B ecommerce tech trends
data.description: Dani Jurado, executive vice president, North America, at ecommerce platform provider VTEX, offers her take on critical trends this year in B2B ecommerce technology.

data.title: Albertsons' retail media network rolls out API access and TransUnion partnership
data.description: New tools are being introduced for Albertsons' retail media advertisers, with performance measurement and ad management in mind.

data.title: JCPenney announces merger with SPARC Group
data.description: The merger forms a new entity, Catalyst Brands, which launches with more than $9 million in revenue, the new company announced. Additionally, it has 1,800 physical store locations, 60,000 employees and $1 billion of liquidity.
